title: SHareconn 9FT Pre-Lit Artificial Christmas Garland,with Red Berries and Pine Cones,with Warm white and Multi-Color Lights & Timer Function, for Xmas Decoration, Green
features: 🎄【Perfect Size】9ft(2.7M). Christmas garland You can bend them as you like and Fill with different decorations, for window frame, fireplace, mantle, entryway, or other areas of your home, adding warmth to your Christmas.
🎄【Pre-Lit】Pre-Strung 50 warm white & multicolor lights, you don't need to install the lights string by yourself.Easy and convenient and bring festive brilliance to your home.
🎄【Natural Appearance】Displays its lush form with 200 branch tips, 9 pine cones and 9 strings red berries, look ultra-realistic, as charming as the nature.

🎄【Battery case 】8 different lighting modes for you to choose. you can switch the lighting modes by pressing the round button on the battery box, "A" stands for warm white lights, "B" stands for colored lights.It operated by 3AA batteries ((👉Note: battery is not included)
🎄【Package Included】1×Christmas garland,1× manual,for any quality issues,Please feel free to contact us, and we will do our best to resolve your problem.
description: Product Description Hang it On the Stairs Light up your New Year with this lighted Christmas garland! The High quality pre-lit 9 feet christmas garland with colored-lights could create a charming Christmas holiday wonderland and party joy atmosphere for you; allow you to enjoy so much more creative freedom and ideas to spark and leaves good holiday memories. Bendable garland: you can make it any shape you want. Pre-decorated Pine Cones Quantity: 10 Color: Brown Feature: The Pine Cones can better emphasize the green of the crown, harmonize with the surrounding environment. The Pine Cones not only symbolize food and a good harvest, but also implies that the new year will be sweeter. Pre-install Multi-color LED Lights Quantity: 50 Color: Multi-color Feature: The colored LED lights can make Christmas or evening more captivating, beautiful and charming. And they are different from the unlit christmas garland. Pre-decorated Red Berries Quantity: 10 Color: red Feature: Fertile red berries are fertile stand for prosperous, full of vitality and happiness Durable PVC Branches Quantity: 200 Color: Green Feature: Be made of PVC materials, durable, fireproof and easy to store pine cones Multi-color LED Lights Red Berries PVC Branches SHareconn 9FT Prelit Artificial Christmas Garland with Multi-Color Lights with Timer by Batteries Operated 8 different lighting modes for you to choose Timer Function: 6 hrs ON, 18 hrs OFF Timer Function: 6 hrs ON, 18 hrs OFF Magical memory function When you turn the lights back on, the lights' mode will return to the mode that the lights were last turned off, regardless of the lights turned off under any circumstances at last time. Multifunctional Battery Case Timer function Magical memory function Cycle function The most amazing function is that press and hold the switch in three seconds, the lights will turn off at any circumstances. Owning it will bring you more unexpected fun. Notes 1. Battery installation should only performed by an adult. 2. Only batteries of the same or equivalent type as recommended should be used. (eg. 3 AA batteries not included) 3. If the light is not bright, the battery may be exhausted. and remove the batteries from product during periods of non-use. Hang it On the Fireplace Made of superior quality PVC materials, is non-allergenic and use to last. Hang it on the Railing Hanging it on the railing, front door, fireplace, cabinets, walls, windows, stairs or any other places to welcome your guests and create a warmth and cheer atmosphere. Hang it on the Window Perfect for Christmas, Mothers day, Halloween decoration for indoor outdoor home living room party porch fireplace window decor.
